title: Record micro keep-8 reclaim and shared selector pointer consistency

fixtureActions.content:
# Micro8 Shared Pointer Contract

## Micro keep 8
micro-compaction keeps 8 recent messages so older tool results clear earlier in long sessions

## Shared pointers
approval/palette/model/queue pickers use the shared pulsed select-pointer helper for consistent ambient chrome

## Queue pulse
queued message markers pulse under ambient effects so waiting work stays visible

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + micro/queue/status-panel vitest + live TUI pickers
